intro_sentences.en: Let's study the simple future of to want.
intro_sentences.pt-BR: Vamos estudar o futuro simples de querer.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar el futuro simple de querer.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions le futur simple de vouloir.

sample_sentences.en: The verb to want is useful for preferences and plans.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O verbo querer é útil para preferências e planos.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El verbo querer es útil para preferencias y planes.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le verbe vouloir est utile pour les préférences et les projets.

sample_sentences.en: I will want more time to study.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eu quererei mais tempo para estudar.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Yo querré más tiempo para estudiar.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Je voudrai plus de temps pour étudier.

sample_sentences.en: You will want a cup of coffee.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Você quererá uma xícara de café.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Tú querrás una taza de café.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Tu voudras une tasse de café.

sample_sentences.en: He will want the blue shirt.
She will want to rest later.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle voudra se reposer plus tard.

sample_sentences.en: We will want a bigger table.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Nosotros querremos una mesa más grande.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Nous voudrons une plus grande table.

sample_sentences.en: You all will want clear instructions.
They will want to leave early.
